text: Year of the World 2514, Year before Christ 1490.
Half, duos semis cubitos, ver. 6, and Exodus 25:10. (Tirinus)
Covering... This indicated that the Scriptures were to be studied with diligence, as they have a literal and a mystical sense. (St. Gregory of Nyssa)
Censers. Hebrew Kapoth, means broad deep dishes or bowls. (Calmet)<hr>Wherein, meaning the golden vessels aforesaid. (Haydock)
